disclaimer: AI-assisted research from public web sources — indicative, verify before quoting a client.

ATTITUDE AT KIM YAM.note: 999-year leasehold (from 1841) boutique 33-unit development completed in 2011 in River Valley, giving it a tenure advantage over most surrounding 99-year leasehold condos. Within walking distance of Somerset, Fort Canning and the newer Great World MRT stations.

LUMIERE.note: 99-year leasehold 168-unit, 45-storey tower at 2 Mistri Road (TOP ~2012) in the Tanjong Pagar/Shenton Way area near Tanjong Pagar and Telok Ayer MRT. Recent transactions averaged roughly S$1,789 psf over the past 12 months.

SELETAR PARK RESIDENCE.note: 99-year leasehold 276-unit condo completed 2015 by Asplenium Land and designed by SCDA Architects, located beside Greenwich V mall in the landed Seletar Hills enclave. Relatively MRT-distant, with Ang Mo Kio MRT about a 5-minute drive and Fernvale LRT roughly 900m away.

ICON.note: 99-year leasehold 646-unit development completed in 2007 by Far East Organization, sitting directly atop the Icon Village retail podium and across the road from Tanjong Pagar MRT. Its large unit count and integrated mall make it a high-liquidity, transit-adjacent CBD project.

GUILLEMARD SUITES.note: Freehold boutique 146-unit development completed 2017 by MK25 along Guillemard Road, about an 8-minute (610m) walk to Mountbatten MRT on the Circle Line. Last-12-month transactions averaged around S$1,499 psf.

ONE-NORTH RESIDENCES.note: 99-year leasehold (TOP 2009) by a UOL-Kheng Leong joint venture, comprising 405 units directly above one-north MRT (CC23) and one stop from Buona Vista interchange, in the heart of the one-north research/business hub. No collective sale activity has been reported.

JOOL SUITES.note: Freehold 52-unit development (TOP 2014) at 2 Sing Joo Walk near Farrer Park/Little India, dominated by small one-bedroom units (387-484 sqft) and penthouses, making it a compact investor/rental-oriented project. No collective sale has been reported.

THE COAST AT SENTOSA COVE.note: 99-year leasehold 249-unit waterfront development (TOP 2010) by Ho Bee Land in Sentosa Cove, the only enclave allowing private marina berthing and foreigner landed purchase. Sentosa Cove non-landed prices fell about 18.7% from 2023 (~$2,125 psf) to 2025 (~$1,728 psf) amid 60% foreigner ABSD, though agents cite early signs of recovery.

TROPIKA EAST.note: Freehold 105-unit development (TOP 2016) by Tong Eng Group at Foo Kim Lin Road off Jalan Eunos, set within a landed-housing enclave with loft and private-pool unit types; nearest MRT is Ubi/Kaki Bukit on the Downtown Line. No collective sale has been reported.

WATERFORD RESIDENCE.note: 999-year leasehold 118-unit development (TOP 2010) by Hoi Hup Realty at Kim Yam Road on the River Valley/Orchard fringe, about 900m from Fort Canning MRT (DT20). No collective sale has been reported.
